title: Digi Applimobs
body:
Digi Applimobs is a fanmade mod. The goal of this mod is to add all the settings of Digimon-Universe-Appli-monsters.

About 140 appmons added with .obj model. Eg: Dokamon, Musimon, Rebootmon, etc.

The settings already added: restraint of app-attributes, App-link, App-Gattai(Fusion), App-arise, Appmon datatable, etc.

Support lang: English(95%), Simplified Chinese(99.9%), Japanese(Only for Appmon names)

Used Geckolib in 1.16.5 version.
